reasoning: This workout targets Koren's lactate clearance limiter by focusing on intervals that train the body to efficiently manage lactate build-up. The last ride indicated a need for this kind of work, with an average power well below the target for the Alpine Loop climb. By incorporating over-unders, we aim to improve fatigue resistance and prepare for the sustained power demands on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 6x5 minutes: over at 242-256W (1 min), under at 201-218W (4 min) with 2-minute recovery spins between sets. Focus on sustaining power and maintaining solid form.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
